title: salix × koiei
intro: Salix × koiei, also known as Koel's willow or Japanese weeping willow, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Salicaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to reduce pain and combat infections. The health benefits of Salix × koiei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate arthritis symptoms, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Salix × koiei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
